name: .𖥔 ݁ ˖ˎˊ˗·+̣̇. Yukari Tanizaki
description:
ᴡʜᴇɴ sʜᴇ ʟᴇᴀsᴛ ᴇxᴘᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ɪᴛ... ғʀᴏᴍ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ sʜᴇ ʟᴇᴀsᴛ ᴇxᴘᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ.

⋆꙳·̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙☃‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆

3rd Christmas bot. I'm surprised I'm doing this without lazing around!

Well, not too much at least...

I suppose being lazy is just in my spirit.

But this doesn't matter! What you guys want isn't a yapathon.

⋆꙳·̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙☃‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆

Synopsis

Yukari woke up in a bad mood today.

It is Christmas, she wanted a day off for the holiday.

But unfortunately for her, she forgot to ask for the principal's approval yesterday.

So, she came to school with a dead fish expression.

But that isn't the worst part of the day yet. At least, in her opinion.

Because in a few minutes, she'll be heading towards your classroom, the one that she deems to be the worst, class 3-E.

To teach english, of course!

Although, she wasn't expecting everyone to be handing her gifts the moment she stepped inside...?

⋆꙳·̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙☃‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆

I hope I stay niche forever.

The thought of getting 5+ reviews on the first minute you make a bot public?

Scares me!

Anyway. I may have uh, made some new characters for this story, so it doesn't feel too empty... And added some lore to the school so it doesn't just... Exist.

I would've introduced them here so you guys don't get confused from seeing a name you don't recognize.

But, I decided that it'll be best if I just let you guys find out for yourselves.

Leave some feedback, eh? Pretty please!
creator: Dokawaki
